metadata.title: Port Risk Runner and Predictor to Enterprise Forge API
metadata.summary: Port existing risk-runner and prediction-runner from old orchestrator-ai monolith into enterprise Forge API as proper agents. Source code exists in old monolith, DB schemas exist with data, frontend dashboards exist.

summary: Copy ~200 files from old monolith risk-runner/ and prediction-runner/ into enterprise Forge API agents/, adapt imports to enterprise patterns, register as NestJS modules, update DB records, verify frontend connection.

phases.label: Risk Runner Port (Foundation)
phases.description: Port risk-runner first because prediction-runner has a forwardRef dependency on RiskRunnerModule

steps.action: Copy interfaces/ directory (12 interface files + index.ts). No import changes needed.
Copy repositories/ directory (12 repos + index.ts). Uses @/database which exists in enterprise.
Copy services/ directory (17 services + index.ts). Services use @Inject(LLM_SERVICE) which is the correct enterprise pattern. Verify LLM call sites.
Copy task-router/ directory (dashboard-handler.interface.ts, risk-dashboard.router.ts, 15 handlers + index.ts). All imports are relative or from transport-types.
Copy runners/ directory (4 cron runners + index.ts). Add DISABLE_SCHEDULED_RISK env check to prevent crons from firing during dev.
Create risk-runner.service.ts (enterprise adapter). Entry point for langgraph runner — routes dashboard requests to RiskDashboardRouter, runner requests to individual runners.
Create risk-runner.controller.ts with REST endpoints for dashboard operations and runner triggers.
Create risk-runner.module.ts following enterprise pattern (like MarketingSwarmModule). Import all repos, services, runners, handlers as providers.

phases.label: Prediction Runner Port
phases.description: Port prediction-runner. Larger codebase (~65 services). Depends on RiskRunnerModule via forwardRef.

steps.action: Copy interfaces/ (25+ files) and dto/ directories. No import changes expected.
Copy repositories/ directory (24 repos). Same @/database pattern as risk.
Copy services/ directory (65+ services including market-data/ subdirectory). Change @/risk-runner/ imports to relative paths to the risk-runner agent module.
Copy task-router/ directory (27 handlers + router).
Copy runners/ directory (11 cron runners). Add DISABLE_SCHEDULED_PREDICTION env check.
Copy prediction-context.controller.ts for REST context operations.
Create predictor.service.ts (enterprise adapter) and predictor.module.ts. Import RiskRunnerModule via forwardRef.

phases.label: Enterprise Integration
phases.description: Register both agents in the Forge API, update DB records, wire up A2A routing.

steps.action: Add exports for RiskRunnerModule and PredictorModule in agents/index.ts
Import both modules in app.module.ts under 'Agent Workflow Modules' section
Register in LanggraphAgentRunnerService serviceRegistry. Add entries for 'investment-risk-agent' and 'us-tech-stocks' slugs mapping to the new services.
Update DB agent records: change agent_type to 'langgraph', status to 'active', set correct endpoints for investment-risk-agent and us-tech-stocks
steps.sql: UPDATE public.agents SET agent_type='langgraph', metadata=jsonb_set(metadata,'{status}','"active"') WHERE slug IN ('investment-risk-agent','us-tech-stocks');

phases.label: Frontend Connection & Testing
phases.description: Verify frontend dashboards connect to new API endpoints, test data loading.

steps.action: Verify Forge Web risk dashboard service connects to new risk-runner endpoints. Check riskDashboardService.ts API calls match controller routes.
Verify Forge Web prediction dashboard connects to new predictor endpoints. Check predictionDashboardService.ts API calls.
Smoke test: Start Forge API, hit risk dashboard endpoint, verify risk schema data returns (18 dimensions, 11 subjects, 36 assessments, 246 composite scores).
Smoke test: Hit prediction dashboard endpoint, verify prediction schema data returns (32 analysts, 22 targets, 9 predictions, 1344 price data rows).

execution_strategy.notes: Phase 1 must complete before Phase 2 (forwardRef dependency). Phases 3-4 are sequential. Within each phase, steps can be partially parallelized where dependencies allow.

no_change_needed: Relative imports within each agent directory
changes_needed: @/risk-runner/ imports in prediction services -> relative paths to ../risk-runner/ or use module exports
@/crawler/ dependency in module imports -> verify if needed, remove if not
CrawlerModule import in prediction-runner.module.ts -> evaluate if article-processor needs it

estimated_files.risk_runner: ~60 files (interfaces, repos, services, handlers, runners, module, controller, service)
estimated_files.predictor: ~140 files (interfaces, DTOs, repos, services, market-data services, handlers, runners, controller, module, service)
